jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Shaadi.com
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Frontend Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
